Xiahou Xian еӨҸдҫҜе’ё
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xiahou Xian (еӨҸдҫҜе’ё). General who assisted Zhong Hui in taking Shu. Xiahou Xian was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
